items.title: Indonesian families mourn loved ones as flood deaths pass 900 | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Residents in the Indonesian region of Aceh Tamiang have been struggling to get aid while mourning the loss of their loved ones as the death toll from floods and landslides that hit Sumatra island rose to more than 900 people.
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #indonesia #flood #sumatra

items.title: Netflix buys Warner Bros, Epstein records and World Cup groups
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Netflix buys Warner Brothers Discovery studios for $72 billion. A Florida judge clears the way to unseal Jeffrey Epsteingrand jury transcripts. The 2026 World Cup draw is announced as FIFA awards President Donald Trump its inaugural peace prize. Plus, Ukraine's looming population crisis.



Recommended Read: A bridge too far? Sicily project tests limits of Italy's ambitions (https://www.reuters.com/business/bridge-too-far-sicily-project-tests-limits-italys-ambitions-2025-12-03/)

items.title: Baby gorilla born at Spanish zoo
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>🦍 A western lowland gorilla was born at Bioparc Fuengirola on November 29, the zoo said, marking the first birth of the critically endangered species in Spain this year and the second in Europe.
 
#gorilla #zoo #spain #bioparcfuengirola #animal

items.title: Surgeon performs remote operation on pig
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Robotic brain surgery was carried out on a pig in Paris by a specialist in Scotland, using a system developed by Lithuanian medtech robotics company Sentante. The team says the successful surgery, performed by interventional neuroradiologist Professor Iris Grunwald, demonstrates a new era in remote robotic brain surgery.
 
#robot #surgery #brain #health #tech</article>
